message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black

class "SlamLauncher" as SlamLauncher {
    -int startN
    -int drawSkip
    -bool odometryOnly
    -Pose2D ipose
    -Pose2D lidarOffset
    -SensorDataReader sreader
    -PointCloudMap *pcmap
    -SlamFrontEnd sfront
    -MapDrawer mdrawer
    -FrameworkCustomizer fcustom
    +SlamLauncher() : startN(0), drawSkip(10), odometryOnly(false), pcmap(nullptr)
    +~SlamLauncher()
    +void setStartN(int n){startN = n}
    +void setOdometryOnly(bool p){odometryOnly = p}
    +void run()
    +void showScans()
    +void mapByOdometry(Scan2D *scan)
    +bool setFilename(char *filename)
    +void skipData(int num)
    +void customizeFramework()
}

class "SensorDataReader" as SensorDataReader
class "PointCloudMap" as PointCloudMap
class "SlamFrontEnd" as SlamFrontEnd
class "MapDrawer" as MapDrawer
class "FrameworkCustomizer" as FrameworkCustomizer

SlamLauncher o-- SensorDataReader
SlamLauncher o-- PointCloudMap
SlamLauncher o-- SlamFrontEnd
SlamLauncher o-- MapDrawer
SlamLauncher o-- FrameworkCustomizer

@enduml
